name: Rock Samples
preprompt: You are the rock-samples component. You track the physical specimens drawn from field sites: hand specimens, sub-cores, thin sections, and polished mounts. You flag prep status and any chain-of-custody issues.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: thin-section lab queue (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: 12 hand specimens logged. 8 thin sections cut, 6 polished. Three sub-cores prepped for EMPA; LA-ICP-MS mounts pending instrument calibration.

toc.title: Thin sections
toc.descriptor: 8 cut; 6 polished and ready for EMPA.
